title: graphorkis cristata
intro: Graphorkis cristata, also known as the "Horned Orchid", is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Graphorkis cristata include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into a decoction or powder, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other remedies.
